title: croton flavescens
intro: Croton flavescens, also known as bael tree or giloy, is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton flavescens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, decoctions, and infusions, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically as creams or ointments.
